DEF'S MOTION FOR BAIL HRG & ORDER RELEASING DEF ON OR/BAIL REDUC - FILED

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB  5 Y:PJ  180D/CTS:71 /4019HALF/X:DEFENDANTMAY SERVED BALANCE OF COUNTY JAIL THRU ELECTRONIC MONITORING IF ACCEPTABLEBY SHERIFF/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $595 PLUS $1859 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A TOTAL FINE AMOUNT OF $2454/ /MOP1/LREG/IID:2/LVAL/LCHEM/VF4:300/RESTV/DNACOMP/IND/WS/X:DRIVER'S LICENSE IS SUSPENDED FOR 4 YEARS/PC/X:UPON COMPLETION OF 18 MONTHS MOP, THEN PROBATION MAY BE REDUCED FROM 5 YEARSTO 3 YEARS PROBATION/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/
